creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #11)

> … (lowercase, maybe preferred): …

Sorry, I forgot to add an example. 

From last year's <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.0R/relnotes/#boot> (consistent with what I was taught, long ago): 

> … ESP partitions should be mounted as MS-DOS filesystems as 
> /boot/efi, and /boot/loader.efi should be copied to 
> /boot/efi/efi/boot/bootx64.efi if the default setup is used. …


(Some users will find the ESP mounted by default.)
